name: Elevatemyscores
description_short: Credit repair company that disputes negative items on credit reports and provides one-on-one credit coaching. Offers three service tiers starting at $80/month with month-to-month cancellation.
description_long:
Elevatemyscores is a credit repair company that combines dispute services with personalized credit coaching to help clients improve their credit scores. According to their website, they have assisted thousands of clients in achieving major financial goals including home ownership and auto purchases. The company positions itself as distinct from traditional credit repair firms by emphasizing credit education alongside negative item disputes.

The company offers three service plans: Elevate Standard ($80/month), Elevate Plus ($130/month, their most popular offering), and Legal Premier ($160/month). All plans include online account access for progress tracking, credit monitoring, score monitoring, and one-on-one access to a credit coaching help desk. Initial consultations are described as free and obligation-free, conducted by FICO-certified credit experts who review the client's credit report, identify negative items, create a dispute plan, and develop a personalized credit coaching strategy.

Elevatemyscores differentiates itself through its emphasis on credit coaching alongside dispute services. They claim an 80% success rate for clients who follow their credit coaching plan, attributing their effectiveness to combining dispute efforts with intensive credit education covering the credit model's key components. The website emphasizes transparency through client online accounts and real-time progress tracking. All plans feature month-to-month cancellation with no long-term contracts.

The company operates within the credit repair industry, which means consumers should understand that while legitimate companies cannot remove accurate negative items, Elevatemyscores disputes items they believe are inaccurate or non-compliant with credit reporting regulations. Results vary by individual circumstances. The claimed 80% success rate is conditional on clients following their recommended credit coaching plan, and typical timelines for credit score improvement are not specified on the website.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: FICO-certified credit experts conduct initial consultations free with no obligation
80% claimed success rate for clients who follow their complete credit coaching plan
Month-to-month cancellation on all three plans with no long-term contract requirement
Online account access with real-time tracking of disputes and progress
Personalized credit coaching plan created during initial audit, not just generic advice
Combines dispute services with credit education on credit model components
All plans include credit monitoring and score monitoring, not just dispute services
Written credit coaching game plan provided with Elevate Plus plan
cons: Typical timeline for credit score improvement is not disclosed on the website
The 80% success rate is conditional on clients following their credit coaching plan, which is not defined
No pricing transparency for what happens after initial consultation—exact dispute costs unclear
Like all credit repair companies, cannot remove accurate negative items, only dispute inaccuracies
No independent reviews, testimonials, or third-party verification provided on the website
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items on their credit reports who want structured credit coaching alongside disputes
Individuals preparing for major purchases (homes, autos) who need faster score improvement than DIY disputing
Budget-conscious consumers willing to commit to credit coaching for sustained improvement
Those seeking transparency through online account access and direct communication with credit experts
diagnosis: Elevatemyscores is best for consumers with multiple negative items who are willing to engage in structured credit coaching and can commit to following a personalized improvement plan. The main caveat is that credit repair companies can only dispute inaccurate items—they cannot remove accurate negative information—so realistic expectations about timelines and outcomes should be established during the free initial consultation before enrolling.
services: Free initial consultation with FICO-certified credit expert
Credit report review and complete analysis of credit file
Identification and documentation of negative items with dispute plan
Dispute of inaccurate or non-compliant items with credit bureaus
Personalized credit coaching plan development during evaluation
One-on-one credit coaching via dedicated help desk
Online account access for progress tracking
Written credit coaching game plan (Elevate Plus and Legal Premier plans)
Intense bureau investigations (Elevate Plus and Legal Premier plans)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8911 N Capital of Texas Hwy Suite 4200 #1046, Austin, TX 78759
